violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by miscellaneous items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back of establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
Utensils were observed being stored on an unclean surface. Utensils must be stored in a clean, and dry location, protected from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips were ordered at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood system have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, grease, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The floor and wall junctures at the bar do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2026
The wall in the storage closet area is in poor repair with exposed insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Beef was observed thawing in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Observed single service items being stored on the floor in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Freezer was observed to have an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of grease buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
At the time of inspection, nozel on three bay sink was not operable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The wall above fryer and in storage area was observed with exposed installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
